title: Zoro Cuts Through the War
description: The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro, Nami. The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: You can't see anything like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It is not just a wild critter.

summary: The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
